title: ADRs + Render Blueprint + deploy/rollback procedures
objective: ADR-001 cloud architecture, ADR-002 environment separation dev/staging/prod, ADR-003 deployment and rollback; author render.yaml Blueprint with env-var references only

acceptance_scenarios.expected: valid Blueprint per official Render docs: FastAPI web service + background worker + cron placeholder, env vars as references (sync:false or fromGroup), no literal secrets
Render vs alternatives considered; decision consistent with PRD 14.1 or documented deviation
dev/staging/prod separation with concrete Supabase project + Render service + Vercel env mapping and promotion rules
explicit rollback procedure per service (Render rollback, migration down policy, Vercel instant rollback) incl. failed-migration handling
cited to official docs URL with retrieval date; no guessed platform behavior
